commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=34c6ebaed7c7cf607386e6c18d8247916928c1b4)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a WebChat controller tail-duplicate guard for same-run final, aborted, and stream-fallback assistant messages plus focused unit tests for duplicate and cross-run cases.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +127. Total +151 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: on PR head, a duplicate visible same-run final with chatMessages already containing the full final and chatStream still holding older partial text skips the final append, then falls through to append the partial stream fallback.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor-supplied real WebChat/gateway proof and a small code/test update before merge; automation should not repair this external PR while proof is still insufficient.

target.title: fix(ui): deduplicate assistant messages on chat.status final event
target.author: sebtardif

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
